website_content: {"portalTitle":"基于Java的员工薪资管理系统设计与实现","aboutTitle":"关于我们","aboutSubtitle":"","aboutContent":"欢迎访问员工薪资管理系统门户。这里用于展示企业网站的轮播图、关于我们介绍和通知公告栏目内容，方便管理员统一维护网站首页展示信息。","systemIntroTitle":"系统简介","systemIntroContent":"本系统主要用于管理员、部门经理和员工对薪资、考勤、绩效及公告信息进行统一管理。","systemIntroImage":"/api/front_assets/aboutus_picture1.jpg","noticeSectionTitle":"通知公告","carouselImages":["/api/front_assets/picture1.jpg","/api/front_assets/picture2.jpg","/api/front_assets/picture3.jpg"],"aboutImages":["/api/front_assets/aboutus_picture1.jpg","/api/front_assets/aboutus_picture2.jpg"]}
